title: lobelia zeylanica
intro: Lobelia zeylanica, also known as Indian tobacco, is a plant species belonging to the Lobelia genus, characterized by its blue-violet flowers and erect stem. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lobelia zeylanica include relief from respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce muscle spasms and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Lobelia zeylanica are often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and it is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
